name: Omeprazole
usage: Treatment of gastric ulcer, duodenal ulcer, reflux esophagitis, H. pylori infection
side_effects: Headache, diarrhea, constipation, vitamin B12 deficiency
contraindications: Allergy to this drug, concurrent use of clarithromycin
precautions: Monitor magnesium levels with long-term use, dose adjustment in elderly
